zh.lifeSummary: 當Roese de Venables於大約1215年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables25歲，母親Alice de Oxton20歲。她於大約1227年與Sir Robert de Stockport在英國藍卡爾丹頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年在英國英格蘭爾斯托普特享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Roese
meanings: A baptismal name derived, like the surname Rous, Rouse, Rowse, from Old French rous, red; from Latin rufus.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roese de Venables was born about 1215, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 25 and her mother, Alice de Oxton, was 20. She married Sir Robert de Stockport about 1227, in Denton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1282, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roese de Venables est née environ 1215, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice de Oxton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Stockport environ 1227, à Denton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1282, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roese de Venables um 1215 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 25 und ihre Mutter Alice de Oxton 20. Sie hat um 1227 in Denton, Lancashire, England Sir Robert de Stockport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1282 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Sir Robert de Stockport circa 1227, nel Denton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1282, nel Stockport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ko.Norbury Hall, Stockport, Cheshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이 비 스톡포트
ko.lifeSummary: Roese de Venables(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Oxton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1227년 영국 랭카실르 덴턴에서 Sir Robert de Stockport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스톡포트에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roese de Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Oxton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Stockport aproximadamente 1227, em Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1282, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.Norbury Hall, Stockport, Cheshire, Engla: норбури би стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roese de Venables родилась около 1215 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Oxton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Stockport около 1227 г. в местности дентон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1282 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Sir Robert de Stockport aproximadamente 1227, en Denton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
